description: Cobb-Douglas same-bar Track-A static frontier recommendation before further PPO/DQN training.
reward_lane: If training reward is Cobb-Douglas, evaluate static and dynamic policies on the same Cobb-Douglas bar.

selected_headroom_cell.name: cd_same_bar_headroom_phi2_psi1_det_v1
selected_headroom_cell.rationale: Largest robust eligible C-D spread among the three 5-seed candidates; all regime tops are interior inventory policies and the optimum changes by regime without stochastic PT or variable demand.

minimal_extension_cell.name: cd_same_bar_minimal_spt_v1
minimal_extension_cell.rationale: Smallest scientific deviation that creates a C-D regime-dependent shift policy, useful as a conservative sensitivity.

rejected_stress_cell.name: phi2_psi1p5_spt
rejected_stress_cell.rejection_reason: Severe regime moves to maximum inventory I1344; useful as stress sensitivity but not as the primary efficiency/headroom C-D lane.

continuous_buffer_note: Not part of this freeze. The current Track-A wrapper is Discrete(18); continuous buffers require a separate diagnostic wrapper/action-space claim after exhausting this C-D static frontier.
